title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness that enables self-building codebases to ship code through custom agent workflows. It supports combining multiple LLM providers like Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 to optimize reasoning power and token efficiency at different workflow stages.
